versions.localizedDescription: requires the use of a custom entitlement file from your cert. so get your mobile provision, name it "entitlements.text" now start copying all of your entitlements starting with "dict" and ending with "dict". now paste that into an Ai bot and say (Please convert the code I send here into XML format. Also, remove all entries related to iCloud and Ubiquity. Leave the rest of the code unchanged. Then, send me the complete modified code directly here in the chat. Do not add a DOCTYPE or any similar declarations - only include the part of the code that I have provided.) now paste that into a file named "entitlements.xml" or use textastic app to do it. sign in esign with that new entitlements.xml
